title: CrispySweetPotatoHealer
description: A delicious and low-calorie-friendly Dutch dish featuring sweet potatoes that are crispy on the outside and creamy inside to aid in hangover recovery.
instructions: Peel and cube the sweet potatoes into bite-sized pieces. Rinse them under cold water.
Combine the almond milk, sugar, maple syrup, vanilla extract, butter, flour, and salt in a saucepan. Stir until the mixture is well combined and heated through.
Add the cubed sweet potatoes to the liquid, stirring gently to coat each piece evenly with the mixture. Let it sit for 5 minutes for the sweet potatoes to absorb some of the liquid.
Transfer the coated sweet potatoes onto a baking sheet lined with parchment paper. Bake in the preheated oven for about 10-12 minutes or until golden brown and crispy on the outside.
Serve hot as an accompaniment to your favorite snacks, especially during hangover recovery.
